bead.title: bead store: make list read APIs ctx-first
bead.description:
PROBLEM
TD-027 requires the foundational bead Store read surface to be typed and ctx-first, but Store list reads still accept untyped variadic arguments. This keeps ReadAll and ReadAllFiltered ambiguous and leaves their callsites dependent on storeCallContext argument scanning.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/bead/backend.go:80-84 declares BeadReader with ReadAll(args ...any) and ReadAllFiltered(args ...any).
- cli/internal/bead/store.go:181-240 exposes Store.ReadAll(args ...any) and Store.ReadAllFiltered(args ...any), using storeCallContext from cli/internal/bead/store.go:134-141.

PROPOSED FIX
Change only Store.ReadAll and Store.ReadAllFiltered to typed ctx-first signatures: ReadAll(ctx context.Context) and ReadAllFiltered(ctx context.Context, pred func(Bead) bool). Update the corresponding BeadReader interface methods in cli/internal/bead/backend.go. Migrate only ReadAll and ReadAllFiltered callsites across the repo to pass context explicitly. Add deterministic bead package tests proving canceled contexts are honored for both list read paths.

NON-SCOPE
- Init and GenID signature migration.
- Mutation APIs: Create, Update, and Close.
- Event method ctx threading: AppendEvent, Events, and EventsByKind.
- Removing workflow helper methods beyond the foundational signatures this bead changes.
- Caller migration unrelated to ReadAll and ReadAllFiltered.
- Get and GetWithArchive signature migration; those are assigned to sibling children.
- Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads.

GOVERNING ARTIFACT
- TD-027.

PARENT/DEPS
- Parent/split source: ddx-464feba2.
- Immediate parent bead: ddx-cc298105.
- Deps: no additional deps; this child can land independently of the setup/id, mutation signature, Get, and GetWithArchive children.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestStoreReadAllHonorsCanceledContext and TestStoreReadAllFilteredHonorsCanceledContext are added or updated under cli/internal/bead and pass with cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'TestStore(ReadAll|ReadAllFiltered)_'.
2. All ReadAll and ReadAllFiltered callsites compile without variadic context arguments, and cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... passes.
3. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
